model_input:

- 'Cancel' button is on the left.
- 'Submit' button is in the middle.
- 'Delete' button is on the right.
- 'Save' button is below them.

ymin: 336, xmin: 378, ymax: 403, xmax: 530.

The previous attempt was (454, 368), which was very close to the center.
Why did it fail? "that position was outside the target element".
Maybe the target element is slightly different or I miscalculated the boundaries.

The text "Submit" is inside the blue area.
The blue area is bounded by a white line.
